notes: Short two-turn response item with one plausible distractor and direct conversational context.
Short passage with explicit context clue but more than one plausible vocabulary distractor.
Situation is inferable from multiple cues, not from a single surface keyword.
Blank requires concession or contrast reading, not one-line paraphrase.
Talk should sustain multiple details and at least one inference over four or more turns.
At least two plausible insertion slots; direct connective clue should not trivially reveal the answer.
Ordering requires discourse tracking and relation between idea blocks, not just time markers.
Intent and implied context should both matter; surface clues alone are insufficient.
Summary options should demand synthesis over abstract argument structure.
Vocabulary item should rely on semantic field inference, not direct synonym lookup.
